channel.title: Agent Orchestration on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agent Orchestration on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: CodeAct pattern and Hyperlight containers in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now includes the CodeAct pattern in public preview. It lets agents execute multi-step plans as a single code block instead of sequential tool calls, which reduced end-to-end latency in representative workloads.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥The Orchestrator Pattern - Turning CLAUDE.md Into an Autonomous Agent Team Pipeline🔥
item.description:
The article presents an “orchestrator pattern” for using CLAUDE.md to coordinate multiple autonomous agents across the software delivery lifecycle. It frames the approach as a way to delegate SDLC tasks to agent pipelines.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
